LanguageData.WVC_Desc_SacrificerSkip: {0_nameDef} was enveloped in a stream of light, and then {0_pronoun} vanished. It's unknown what exactly happened to {0_objective}, but it's clear {0_pronoun} can be presumed dead.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_SacrificerEditorTip: Allows editing of xenogens within certain limits.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_SacrificerRewardTip: Allows to select the type of reward.
